context._doc: Sizing/HA + lifecycle defaults are env-aware in iac/config.py (dev: single Neptune/OpenSearch node, auto-destroy; non-dev: 2-instance HA, retain + deletion protection). Override with -c key=value, e.g. -c neptune_instance=db.r6g.xlarge -c opensearch_count=2. Reuse infra: -c vpc_id=vpc-xxx -c cache_bucket_name=my-bucket. Public egress: -c network_mode=public. Existing guardrail: -c guardrail_identifier=gr-xxx.
